summary: Testing of MuscleGrid CRM enhancements - Walk-in Customer tickets, Notes viewing, Serial Numbers for repair, and Customer Feedback Surveys. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via UI testing.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console, not blocking)

seed_data_creation: Created test walk-in tickets during testing (prefixed with TEST)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features for iteration 15 verified. Walk-in tickets work correctly with MG-W- prefix, skip accountant after repair. Serial number fields are mandatory for complete repair. Notes dialog shows Customer issue, Call Support diagnosis/notes, and Supervisor notes. Admin Analytics shows Customer Feedback Surveys table with staff name, role, total reviews, and all rating categories.

admin_analytics_feedback_table.customer_feedback_surveys_section: PASS - Section visible at bottom of Analytics page
admin_analytics_feedback_table.company_stats_cards: PASS - Company Avg Rating, Total Feedback Received, Total Staff Tracked

technician_walkin_customer.walkin_button_visible: PASS - 'Walk-in Customer' button in technician dashboard
technician_walkin_customer.walkin_dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog opens with all required fields
technician_walkin_customer.address_section: PASS - Address fields for return shipping
technician_walkin_customer.ticket_number_format: PASS - Walk-in tickets start with MG-W-

technician_notes_viewing.notes_column_in_queue: PASS - Notes column visible in repair queue table
technician_notes_viewing.notes_button_with_count: PASS - Shows number of notes per ticket
technician_notes_viewing.customer_issue_visible: PASS - Customer section with issue description
technician_notes_viewing.call_support_notes_visible: PASS - Call Support diagnosis and agent notes
technician_notes_viewing.supervisor_notes_section: PASS - Supervisor notes section available when present

complete_repair_serial_numbers.device_serial_number_field: PASS - 'Inverter/Battery Serial Number' field with data-testid
complete_repair_serial_numbers.validation: PASS - Backend returns 422 when serial numbers missing

walkin_ticket_workflow.starts_at_factory: PASS - Walk-in tickets start at 'received_at_factory' status
walkin_ticket_workflow.skips_accountant: PASS - After repair, walk-in goes to 'ready_for_dispatch' not 'repair_completed'

authentication.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Technician and Admin both login successfully

admin.GET /api/admin/performance-metrics: PASS - Returns staff_metrics with feedback ratings and company_stats

technician.POST /api/technician/walkin-ticket: PASS - Creates walk-in ticket with MG-W- prefix
technician.GET /api/technician/queue: PASS - Returns tickets with all_notes field containing Customer/Call Support/Supervisor notes

tickets.GET /api/tickets/{id}: PASS - Returns ticket details with is_walkin flag
tickets.POST /api/tickets/{id}/complete-repair: PASS - Requires board_serial_number and device_serial_number, walk-in goes to ready_for_dispatch
